security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: https://ipc.localhost

bundle.longDescription: 5-step installer for the Roomler Agent on Windows. Detects existing installs, picks deployment mode (perUser, perMachine, or perMachine + SystemContext), downloads the matching MSI through roomler.ai's proxy, runs the install + service registration + env-var setup, and enrolls the agent against the configured Roomler server. No PowerShell required.
